hero.name: Ravi Kumar Rayapalli
hero.role: AI Engineer specializing in LLM systems, agentic architectures, and retrieval-augmented generation.
hero.summary: I build production-grade AI applications with multi-agent workflows, hybrid retrieval, knowledge graphs, and scalable backend services across cloud environments.
hero.availability: Open to AI engineering and backend platform opportunities

about.bio: I am an AI Engineer with a strong foundation in backend engineering and data platforms. My recent work centers on LLM systems, retrieval-driven agents, knowledge graphs, and evaluation pipelines, while my broader experience includes distributed services, microservice platforms, cloud deployments, and production-focused system design.
about.stack: Python, SQL, JavaScript, TypeScript, Google ADK, LangGraph, LangChain, Neo4j, Vertex AI, OpenAI, GCP, AWS

highlights.title: Agentic AI systems
highlights.description: Planner-executor architectures, tool invocation layers, structured memory, and coordinated multi-agent execution.

highlights.title: Hybrid retrieval and RAG
highlights.description: Dense retrieval, BM25, reranking, vector databases, and knowledge-graph grounding for higher quality responses.

highlights.title: Cloud-native backend delivery
highlights.description: Production services and pipelines built with GCP, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, and observability in mind.

projects.title: Legal AI Systems at Optum
projects.summary: Built legal AI systems for healthcare workflows using LLM-driven document intelligence, entity extraction, clause classification, semantic search, and multi-agent orchestration over large legal corpora.
projects.outcome: Designed retrieval agents, MCP-compliant tools, and evaluation pipelines that improved grounding, regression safety, and end-to-end reliability.

projects.title: Maya Talent Agent
projects.summary: Developed a LangGraph-based conversational hiring agent for candidate intake, resume parsing, skill matching, follow-up generation, interview scheduling, and FAQ support.
projects.outcome: Combined structured state machines, retrieval pipelines, guardrails, and observability to support consistent multi-step screening workflows.

projects.title: Scalable Backend Platforms
projects.summary: Built and led backend platforms across startups and enterprise teams using Node.js, Python, Java, microservices, data pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and containerized deployments.
projects.metric: 8 years across product and enterprise engineering
projects.outcome: Delivered scalable services, data processing systems, CI/CD workflows, and production integrations across healthcare, recruiting, analytics, and enterprise products.

services.title: LLM and Agent Architectures
services.description: Multi-agent systems, planner-executor patterns, tool orchestration, and retrieval-grounded workflows.

services.title: Backend and Data Platforms
services.description: Scalable APIs, microservices, ingestion pipelines, cloud-native services, and production system design.

services.title: Evaluation and Reliability
services.description: Guardrails, observability, regression testing, retrieval metrics, and benchmark-driven AI system quality.

process.title: Design for grounding
process.description: I start with the data sources, retrieval paths, and tool interfaces needed to keep model outputs anchored.

process.title: Orchestrate deliberately
process.description: State transitions, routing logic, fallback handling, and schema validation are defined before scale is added.

process.title: Measure what matters
process.description: I use evaluations, tracing, logging, and retrieval metrics to track correctness, latency, and drift.

process.title: Ship for production
process.description: Containerization, CI/CD, cloud deployment, and runtime controls ensure systems stay maintainable after launch.

testimonials.quote: M.S. in Information Systems, Cleveland State University
testimonials.author: Graduated May 2025

contact.intro: Tell me about the role, the AI platform, or the backend problem you want help building.
